member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.ClaudeCmaAnalyzer.ValidateSubjectData(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.Lead,System.Collections.Generic.List{RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Models.Comp},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Validates subject property data against comp data to detect fat-finger errors. Logs warnings but does NOT block the analysis — Claude handles it inside leadInsights.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.ClaudeCmaAnalyzer.GetStringPropertyCaseInsensitive(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Case-insensitive property lookup on a JsonElement. Claude may return "pricingStrategy", "PricingStrategy", "pricing_strategy", etc.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.CompAggregator.NormalizeAddressForDedup(System.String)
member.summary: Aggressive normalization for dedup: extract only street number + street name + zip. Strips municipality/township/city suffixes so that "123 Main St, Springfield" and "123 Main St, Springfield Township" hash to the same key when zip matches.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.CompAggregator.NormalizeStreetOnly(System.String)
member.summary: Street-only normalization for cross-zip dedup. Extracts the street number + full street name (including unit), stripping city, state, and zip. Used in pass 2 of . Example: "49 Middlesex Rd Unit B, Matawan, NJ 07747" → "49 MIDDLESEX RD UNIT B" Example: "49 Middlesex Rd Unit B, Old Bridge, NJ 08857" → "49 MIDDLESEX RD UNIT B" Strategy: truncate at the 2-letter state code followed by a 5-digit zip. After truncation, strip the city (everything after the last street/unit token that is NOT a US state abbreviation). Since we truncate at "ST 00000", we then remove the state-abbreviated city by stripping the trailing "[A-Z]{2}" token.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.CompAggregator.FilterAndRankComps(System.Collections.Generic.List{RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Models.Comp},System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Models.CompSearchRequest)
member.summary: Filters and ranks comps by geographic proximity to the subject property zip code, deprioritizes comps beyond 10 miles, removes price/sqft outliers using the IQR method, and returns the best 5.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.CompAggregator.ExtractZip(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts a 5-digit zip code from an address string, or returns empty string.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.RentCastCompSource.LastValuation
member.summary: The valuation returned by the most recent call. Populated before comps are returned so callers can read SubjectProperty without a second API call.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Lead.CMA.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCmaPipeline(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers CMA pipeline compute services: , , , and . The Channel-based CmaProcessingWorker BackgroundService was removed in Phase 4; Azure Durable Functions now orchestrate CMA processing via CmaProcessingFunction.
